evidence_summary: Execute a high-stakes climb up The far wall that transitions from urgent physical exertion to a sudden moment of accidental destruction, concluding with the group exiting dainty_china_country.

The group reaches the far wall to exit. As they climb, the Cowardly Lion's tail accidentally smashes a china church. They successfully scale the wall and leave the country, reflecting on the fragility of their journey.
